view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for Zoom integration is satisfied as evidenced by the successful creation of a Zoom meeting link.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for Zoom integration is satisfied as evidenced by the successful creation of a Zoom meeting link.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step to validate the requirement of "Zoom, Google Meet, Teams integration" is supported by the linked use case, which explicitly describes the automatic creation of a Zoom meeting link for a telehealth session. The evidence provided shows that a unique Zoom meeting room was created and the link was included in the confirmation email, confirming that the integration is functioning as required. This directly satisfies the requirement for Zoom integration.
